creator: jarrod@downtools.com.au
text:
Unless the connection behaviour of the NRPE backend has changed, =
shifting the default to enable SSL is likely to cause pain.  See my last =
reply to ports/118434 for the reason and though a few years ago now, I =
believe it still holds.  This request has popped up a number of times =
too, perhaps a slave port (net-mgmt/nrpe2-ssl?) where it's enabled by =
default is needed.  I'll look in to this.

Olli.  It would be appreciated if you could update my email address on =
those four ports.  Thanks.

Happy New Year everyone!

Jarrod.=
